overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a waterfront homeless encampment with tents and trash bags, then transitioning to walk along a coastal highway with futuristic traffic. Bright sunny day with clear skies, palm trees, and a futuristic city skyline featuring a prominent ferris wheel and roller coaster.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the waterfront encampment, passing piles of trash bags and makeshift tents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction ahead of the player character

entered.detail: large piles of blue and white garbage bags stacked on the concrete promenade
green and white camping tent set up in the encampment area
tall palm trees lining the waterfront promenade
large amusement park ferris wheel visible against the skyline
tall futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades in the distance
yellow market umbrellas shading vendor stalls
tarpaulin and fabric shelters constructed in the encampment
large green shipping container or storage unit

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny waterfront promenade lined with palm trees, passing through a homeless encampment with tents, trash bags, and makeshift shelters. The futuristic city skyline and a large ferris wheel are visible in the background while a few pedestrians wander through the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between encampment and highway

events.description: character transitions from walking to running through the encampment area
leaving the dense tent encampment and approaching the multi-lane highway

agents.ego_description: running through the tent area and turning toward the coastal highway

entered.detail: bright yellow shipping container or storage unit
green metal guardrail separating the promenade from the highway
multi-lane asphalt road with lane markings
green metal safety railing along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: The character picks up speed and runs through the remaining encampment area, passing a yellow container and transitioning toward the highway. The palm trees shift from the right to the left side of the frame as the camera approaches the road with its guardrails and moving traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with amusement park backdrop

events.description: futuristic cars and vehicles passing by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway sidewalk next to moving traffic, with the ferris wheel visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the highway lanes

entered.detail: metal roller coaster tracks and framework behind the ferris wheel

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide coastal highway with moderate futuristic traffic passing by. Green guardrails line the road, and palm trees line the sidewalk. The ferris wheel and roller coaster of the amusement park dominate the right side of the skyline, while the futuristic city center rises in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cluttered waterfront encampment into a wide, bustling coastal highway. It begins with a walk along a sunny promenade, passing through a makeshift settlement of tents and trash bags beneath a skyline featuring a prominent ferris wheel. As the character picks up speed and runs past a yellow container, the environment shifts from the encampment toward the road, with palm trees moving from the right to the left side of the frame. The scene then opens onto a wide highway where the camera follows the line of green guardrails amidst moderate futuristic traffic. Finally, the view expands to reveal the amusement park's roller coaster and the distant city center rising against a clear sky.
